table.name: vtiger_estates
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_estates` ( `estatesid` int(19) NOT NULL, `estate_number` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_balance` decimal(13,2) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_deactivated` varchar(3) DEFAULT '0', `cf_estate_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_object_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_house_number` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_litera` varchar(10) DEFAULT '', `cf_apartment_number` int(5) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_contact_id` varchar(10) DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`estatesid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci

table.name: vtiger_estatescf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_estatescf` ( `estatesid` int(19) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`estatesid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci
